STSBOSSANCIENTS-SLIMED_BOSS.title: Slime Boss
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SLIMED_BOSS.talk.firstVi:
...After a thousand years, someone has come to this tower again.
One of the remnants of the old era, the [green]Slime Boss[/green], has seen the light of day once more.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SLIMED_BOSS.talk.ANY.0-0:
[sine]Drip~ drip~ drip~[/sine]
[green][jitter]Slime[/jitter][/green] drips from the cave ceiling in front of you.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SLIMED_BOSS.talk.ANY.1-0:
[fade_in]"Another one... a new face..."[/fade_in]
The [green]Slime Boss[/green] [sine]gurgles[/sine] and spits out a [gold]relic[/gold] to show you.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SLIMED_BOSS.talk.IRONCLA: [fade_in]"Take these... and [jitter]slaughter this tower[/jitter] once more..."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"Let bygones be bygones. It's all because of that [blue]whale[/blue] and the [purple]heart[/purple] it created..."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"I think we don't have to be enemies this time. Your problem is tied to that [blue]whale[/blue]."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"Go see the [gold]Architect[/gold]. He might be able to help you..."[/fade_in]
[sine]At least... you have to see... the first boss...[/sine]
[fade_in]"Your combat power seems different from before... is it because of a new body?"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"Anyway, it doesn't matter... go see the [gold]Architect[/gold]..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-SLIMED_BOSS.talk.NECROBI: [fade_in]"A new face? You seem more like one of us..."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"...Take these and be on your way..."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"Do you think those things were right?"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"I don't mean to excuse the [gold]Architect[/gold]... but if you trace the source, that [blue]whale[/blue] is definitely involved."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"A new face... and a king as well?"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"I was... but now my era has ended, and even [blue]Massareth[/blue] is in decline..."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"Now, accept the final legacy of this old-era king, Your Highness..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HEXA_GHOST.title: Hexaghost
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HEXA_GHOST.talk.firstVis:
...After a thousand years, someone has come to this tower again.
One of the remnants of the old era, the [purple]Hexaghost[/purple], has seen the light of day once more.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HEXA_GHOST.talk.ANY.0-0r: Green [green][jitter]flames[/jitter][/green] ignite out of nowhere, casting eerie light on the surrounding walls. The [purple]Hexaghost[/purple] examines you carefully.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HEXA_GHOST.talk.ANY.1-0r: [fade_in]"Another thousand years... another batch of new faces..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HEXA_GHOST.talk.IRONCLAD: [fade_in]"I see the blood in your veins. Let it burn... [jitter]incinerate this hateful tower, and take revenge on the source of your tragedy[/jitter]!"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"Why do you help me, my former enemy?"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"You are no longer the person you once were. Now you're just a pitiful [jitter]puppet[/jitter]..."[/fade_in]

[fade_in]"So, I pity you.
Take these gifts, and then go see the [gold]Architect[/gold]..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HEXA_GHOST.talk.SILENT.0: [fade_in]"...A thousand years haven't cured you of your quiet nature..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HEXA_GHOST.talk.SILENT.1: [fade_in]"Take these... all answers can only be found at the highest point of this tower..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HEXA_GHOST.talk.SILENT.2: [fade_in]"Whether it's this [green]blight[/green]... or the [purple]Corrupt Heart[/purple]... both are inseparably connected to that [blue]whale[/blue]."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"Go see the [gold]Architect[/gold]... maybe there you'll find your answers..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HEXA_GHOST.talk.DEFECT.0: [fade_in]"An automatic robot? Looks familiar... let me think..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HEXA_GHOST.talk.DEFECT.1: [fade_in]"I remember now. The fourth adventurer, right?"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HEXA_GHOST.talk.DEFECT.2: [fade_in]"It seems your iterative functions haven't completely disappeared. You're better at handling anomalies now, aren't you?"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"Anyway, it doesn't matter... go see the [gold]Architect[/gold]. He can fix you."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HEXA_GHOST.talk.NECROBIN: [fade_in]"Exactly. That's why I'm here, to take revenge on him!"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"...You probably aren't strong enough yet, but take these anyway. They might come in handy..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HEXA_GHOST.talk.REGENT.0: [fade_in]"A king has come to this tower? How puzzling..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HEXA_GHOST.talk.REGENT.1: [fade_in]"Heir to the Star Throne, take one of these with you..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-HEXA_GHOST.talk.REGENT.2: [fade_in]"So why have you entered this tower?"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"For my people! I enter the tower, and I conquer!"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GUARDIAN.title: Guardian
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GUARDIAN.talk.firstVisit:
...After a thousand years, someone has come to this tower again.
The last remaining image of this [gold]Guardian[/gold] has also seen the light of day.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GUARDIAN.talk.ANY.0-0r.a:
[sine]Beep~ beep~ beep~[/sine]
[jitter][red]Error: Undefined character, no available command![/red][/jitter]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GUARDIAN.talk.ANY.1-0r.a:
[sine]Beep~ beep~ beep~[/sine]
[jitter][gold]Default text match: Hello, world![/gold][/jitter]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GUARDIAN.talk.IRONCLAD.2: [fade_in]"What's your situation now? And what's with these surroundings?"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"After a thousand years, even automatons break down completely from lack of maintenance."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"My main body has shut down. What you see now is just an intelligent image created and preserved back then."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GUARDIAN.talk.SILENT.2-0: [fade_in]Detected residual [green]blight[/green]. Advised to seek help from the [gold]Architect[/gold].[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GUARDIAN.talk.DEFECT.2-1: [fade_in]As you can see, my main body is damaged. But I didn't expect you to actually keep running until now![/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GUARDIAN.talk.DEFECT.2-2: [fade_in]My kin, please accept my parts and continue onward![/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GUARDIAN.talk.NECROBINDE:
[sine]Beep~ beep~ beep~[/sine]
[fade_in][red]Target identification failed[/red]. Undefined character, no available command![/fade_in]
[fade_in]"...Strange automaton, what were you designed to do?"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]My purpose is to guard this tower! Please kill [blue]Neow[/blue]!"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"Kill [blue]Neow[/blue]? No, no. Until I complete my [jitter][red]revenge[/red][/jitter] on the [gold]Architect[/gold], I still need its help."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GUARDIAN.talk.REGENT.0-0:
[sine]Beep~ beep~ beep~[/sine]
[fade_in][red]Target identification failed[/red]. Reading database and updating![/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GUARDIAN.talk.REGENT.1-0: [fade_in][gold]"Command updated based on database. Salutations, Son of the Sun!"[/gold][/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GUARDIAN.talk.REGENT.2-0: [fade_in]"How amusing. Even an automaton has information on me?"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GUARDIAN.talk.REGENT.2-1: [fade_in]The automatons in the tower share a database. Once encountered, the data is automatically updated and uploaded.[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-GUARDIAN.talk.REGENT.2-2: [fade_in]"I see. No wonder those machines are so troublesome."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AUTOMATON.title: Bronze Automaton
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AUTOMATON.talk.firstVisi:
...After a thousand years, someone has come to this tower again.
One of the remnants of the old era, the [gold]Bronze Automaton[/gold], has seen the light of day once more.
[fade_in]"More new faces. This opening of the tower has attracted quite a few newcomers..."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"Come, take some supplies, and then go to the top of the tower to visit the [gold]Architect[/gold] for me..."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"I remember seeing you when the tower last opened. You're the Ironclad."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"Come... take these. You don't look so good, but I believe the [gold]Architect[/gold] can help you."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"I was once just a puppet forced to work for the [purple]Corrupt Heart[/purple]..."[/fade_in]

[fade_in]"Now that the [purple]Corrupt Heart[/purple] is dead, I see no need for us to be enemies.
Take these gifts, and then go see the [gold]Architect[/gold]..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AUTOMATON.talk.SILENT.0-: [fade_in]"...A thousand years have passed, and you still talk so little..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AUTOMATON.talk.SILENT.1-: [fade_in]"Take these supplies. I don't know if they'll help..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AUTOMATON.talk.SILENT.2-: [fade_in]"Whether it's this [green]blight[/green]... or the [purple]Corrupt Heart[/purple]... both are inseparably connected to that [blue]whale[/blue]."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"Go see the [gold]Architect[/gold]... maybe there you'll find your answers..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AUTOMATON.talk.DEFECT.0-: [fade_in]"A fellow machine? Looks familiar... are you that Defect with the [gold]biased cognition[/gold]?"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AUTOMATON.talk.DEFECT.1-: [fade_in]"Let me think... you can use these, right? Then take them."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AUTOMATON.talk.DEFECT.2-: [fade_in]"Come to think of it, I've seen another one like you, also with some [red]defects[/red]. Maybe you could be friends?"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"So you already know each other. Take these and go to the top of the tower to see the [gold]Architect[/gold]. Then both you and your friend can be fixed."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AUTOMATON.talk.NECROBIND: [fade_in]"...Me? I'm one of the great [gold]Architect[/gold]'s masterpieces."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"...So you're saying the [gold]Architect[/gold] killed all of them?"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"No, no, I think there must be some misunderstanding."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"...The facts are as I said. If you don't want to believe them, there's nothing I can do..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AUTOMATON.talk.REGENT.0-: [fade_in]"A new face? Looks like this tower is about to get lively..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AUTOMATON.talk.REGENT.1-: [fade_in]"Take one of these as a welcome gift."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AUTOMATON.talk.REGENT.2-: [fade_in]"So why have you entered this tower?"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"For my people! I enter the tower, and I conquer!"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-COLLECTOR.title: Collector
STSBOSSANCIENTS-COLLECTOR.talk.firstVisi:
...After a thousand years, someone has come to this tower again.
One of the remnants of the old era, the [green]Collector[/green], has seen the light of day once more.
Two torch heads with [green]ghostly green flames[/green] burning on top stand guard in front of the [green]Collector[/green]. She examines you carefully.
[fade_in]"It's been a long time since this tower has had new visitors..."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"Ironclad... too bad, I already have a similar item in my collection."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"Interested in cooperating? You can take one of these collectibles with you."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"Consider it an investment. At the top of this tower there's a [jitter]fake[/jitter] who [purple]stole[/purple] my servants and my position."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"So, take these collectibles and go kill that [jitter]fake[/jitter] for me!"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-COLLECTOR.talk.SILENT.0-: [fade_in]"...You look like you're [red]not long for this world[/red]. That's uncommon for your kind..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-COLLECTOR.talk.SILENT.1-: [fade_in]"Oh, it's that [purple]heart[/purple] that brought you to this state..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-COLLECTOR.talk.SILENT.2-: [fade_in]"Whether it's this [green]blight[/green]... or the [purple]Corrupt Heart[/purple]... both are inseparably connected to the [gold]Architect[/gold]."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"Go see the [gold]Architect[/gold]... and if you see someone who looks like me on the way, don't hesitate—[jitter]kill her outright[/jitter]!"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-COLLECTOR.talk.DEFECT.2-: [fade_in]"You're back. Looks like you do have some advantages over other automatons."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"Anyway, it doesn't matter... go see the [gold]Architect[/gold], and kill someone for me on the way."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-COLLECTOR.talk.NECROBIND: [fade_in]"Tell me some stories, just to pass the time. These collectibles will be your reward..."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"...So you have a grudge against the [gold]Architect[/gold]?"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"That's right. I don't mind telling you, I'm here for revenge!"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"...Little undead, I'm afraid you're not strong enough yet. But take these anyway; they might be useful..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-COLLECTOR.talk.REGENT.0-: [fade_in]"What do I see... a king among the stars?"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-COLLECTOR.talk.REGENT.1-: [fade_in]"Take one of these as a token of our acquaintance..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-COLLECTOR.talk.REGENT.2-: [fade_in]"Among my many collections, I still lack one [jitter]like you[/jitter]..."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"If you try that, I won't go down without a fight!"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHAMP.title: Champion
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHAMP.talk.firstVisitEve:
...After a thousand years, someone has come to this tower again.
One of the remnants of the old era—oh no, the [blue]Champion[/blue] is still doing well even now.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHAMP.talk.ANY.0-0r.anci:
Sunlight filters through the purple glass into this dark castle. Dark purple light falls on the walls, giving off a strange atmosphere.
The [blue]Champion[/blue] sits upright at a round table, examining you carefully.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHAMP.talk.ANY.1-0r.anci: [fade_in]"...Join our cause to overthrow the tower. Consider these supplies as your starting capital."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHAMP.talk.IRONCLAD.1-0r:
[fade_in]"...Join us! Let this tower [jitter][red]collapse[/red][/jitter] once more
[jitter]—just like you did before![/jitter]"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"What are you planning? Aren't we enemies?"[/fade_in]
[sine]*Sigh*[/sine]
[fade_in]"Now... you're no longer my enemy. Doesn't the one behind you also despise the [gold]Architect[/gold]?"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"So, let's cooperate! Take these supplies and strike down the [gold]Architect[/gold] with your longsword..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHAMP.talk.SILENT.1-0r.a: [fade_in]"Care to cooperate with us? These supplies are my sincerity."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHAMP.talk.SILENT.2-0.an: [fade_in]"This [green]blight[/green] is ultimately a mutation caused by the [gold]Architect[/gold]. Now that the [green]blight[/green] has receded, He must have a way to solve this problem."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHAMP.talk.SILENT.2-1.an: [fade_in]"So, let's cooperate! Take these supplies, draw your dagger against the [gold]Architect[/gold], and force the answers you need..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHAMP.talk.DEFECT.0-0.an: [fade_in]"An automaton? I think I've seen you somewhere."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHAMP.talk.DEFECT.1-0r.c: [fade_in]"...Don't you have a companion? Why didn't I see him this time?"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHAMP.talk.DEFECT.2-0.an: [fade_in]"[sine]According to article whatever of the [blue]Robot Code[/blue][/sine]... anyway, [jitter]you have to listen to us[/jitter]. Join us!"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHAMP.talk.DEFECT.2-2.an: [fade_in]"Never mind if you don't understand... take these and go see the [gold]Architect[/gold]!"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHAMP.talk.NECROBINDER.0: [fade_in]"An undead? A rare guest indeed... Interested in joining us to overthrow this tower?"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHAMP.talk.NECROBINDER.1: [fade_in]"As a sign of goodwill, you can take some supplies you need."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHAMP.talk.NECROBINDER.2: [fade_in]"So you also have a grudge against the [gold]Architect[/gold]?"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"I'm here to take revenge on the [gold]Architect[/gold]! Those people were innocent—why did they have to die like that?"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"...Then it's simple. Take these supplies and take your revenge on the [gold]Architect[/gold]!"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHAMP.talk.REGENT.0-0.an: [fade_in]"A king? Why have you come here?"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHAMP.talk.REGENT.1-0r.a: [fade_in]"...Salutations. Take one of these with you."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-CHAMP.talk.REGENT.2-0.an: [fade_in]"Would you be interested in joining us to overthrow the [gold]Architect[/gold] at the top of this tower?"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONU.title: Donu & Deca
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONU.talk.firstVisitEver:
...After a thousand years, someone has come to this tower again.
Two remnants of the old era, [green]Donu[/green] and [orange]Deca[/orange], have seen the light of day once more.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONU.talk.ANY.1-0r.ancie: [fade_in]"Another new face... take a few of these with you..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONU.talk.IRONCLAD.2-1.a: [fade_in]"You are no longer the person you once were. Now you're just a pitiful [jitter]puppet[/jitter]..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONU.talk.IRONCLAD.2-2.a:
[fade_in]"So, I pity you.
Take these gifts, and then go see the [gold]Architect[/gold]..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONU.talk.SILENT.0-0.anc: [fade_in]"...A thousand years haven't cured you of your quiet nature..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONU.talk.SILENT.1-0r.an: [fade_in]"Take these... all answers can only be found at the highest point of this tower..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONU.talk.SILENT.2-0.anc: [fade_in]"Whether it's this [green]blight[/green]... or the [purple]Corrupt Heart[/purple]... both are inseparably connected to that [blue]whale[/blue]."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONU.talk.SILENT.2-1.anc: [fade_in]"Go see the [gold]Architect[/gold]... maybe there you'll find your answers..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONU.talk.DEFECT.0-0.anc: [fade_in]"An automaton? Looks familiar... let me think..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONU.talk.DEFECT.1-0r.ch: [fade_in]"I remember now. You're that defective robot, right?"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONU.talk.DEFECT.2-0.anc: [fade_in]"It seems your iterative functions haven't completely disappeared. At least now you're better at handling anomalies."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONU.talk.DEFECT.2-2.anc: [fade_in]"Anyway, it doesn't matter... go see the [gold]Architect[/gold]. He can fix you."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONU.talk.NECROBINDER.0-:
[fade_in]"A dead one...
Hello, take whatever you like..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONU.talk.NECROBINDER.2-: [fade_in]"That's right, and I'm here to take revenge on him!"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"...Then I'm afraid you're not qualified yet. But take these anyway; they might be useful on your way..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONU.talk.REGENT.0-0.anc: [fade_in]"You don't look like you're from around here. Mind telling us where you're from?"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONU.talk.REGENT.1-0r.an: [fade_in]"Heir to the Star Throne, take one of these with you..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONU.talk.REGENT.2-0.cha: [fade_in]"I am the king among the stars, the Son of the Sun!"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-DONU.talk.REGENT.2-1.anc: [fade_in]"Then good luck to you, Heir to the Star Throne."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENED.title: Awakened One
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENED.talk.firstVisit:
...After a thousand years, someone has come to this tower again.
One of the remnants of the old era, the [purple]Awakened One[/purple], has seen the light of day once more.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENED.talk.ANY.0-0r.a:
The [purple]Awakened One[/purple]'s curious gaze sharply scans your entire body.
[fade_in]"Indeed, after so long, it's time for some new faces..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENED.talk.ANY.1-0r.a: [fade_in]"Take some things... but not for free. Spread the doctrine of the [blue]Bird Cult[/blue]."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENED.talk.IRONCLAD.0: [fade_in]"Ironclad... setting foot on the top floor of this tower again, any thoughts?"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENED.talk.IRONCLAD.1: [fade_in]"If you want to get rid of that [red]demon[/red], it's not too late to convert to the worship of Lord [blue]Massareth[/blue]..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENED.talk.IRONCLAD.2: [fade_in]"The reason is simple. A thousand years have passed, and the [blue]Bird Cult[/blue] has declined with time..."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"We need fresh blood. At least we can't let the legacy of the [blue]Bird Cult[/blue] end here..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENED.talk.SILENT.0-0: [fade_in]"...You're as silent as ever, just like when we first met..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENED.talk.SILENT.1-0: [fade_in]"Take these... I have only one request: help spread the doctrine of the [blue]Bird Cult[/blue]..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENED.talk.SILENT.2-0: [fade_in]"Whether it's this [green]blight[/green]... or the [purple]Corrupt Heart[/purple]... both are inseparably connected to that [blue]whale[/blue]."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENED.talk.SILENT.2-1: [fade_in]"Keep going up, and go see the [gold]Architect[/gold]. I believe you'll find your answers."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENED.talk.DEFECT.2-0: [fade_in]"Language system corrupted? That's understandable, given how many times you've been rebooted and repaired."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENED.talk.DEFECT.2-2: [fade_in]"I can't understand what you're trying to say... but that's fine. Go see the [gold]Architect[/gold]. He can fix you."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENED.talk.NECROBINDE: [fade_in]"A mutant? You've got some nerve calling me that."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"...Anyway, you can take some supplies from here."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"So what do I have to give in return?"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENED.talk.REGENT.0-0: [fade_in]"A new face. You don't look like you're from the Twin Planets..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENED.talk.REGENT.1-0: [fade_in]"Indeed. I am the firstborn of the Sun, heir to the stars... a king among the stars!"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENED.talk.REGENT.2-0: [fade_in]"So why have you entered this tower?"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENED.talk.REGENT.2-1: [fade_in]"For my people! I enter the tower, and I conquer!"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-AWAKENED.talk.REGENT.2-2: [fade_in]"I wish you success. Consider these supplies as my sponsorship. Just help spread the doctrine of the [blue]Bird Cult[/blue] afterward."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TIME_EATER.title: Time Eater
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TIME_EATER.talk.firstVis:
...After a thousand years, someone has come to this tower again.
One of the remnants of the old era, the [blue]Time Eater[/blue], has seen the light of day once more.
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TIME_EATER.talk.ANY.0-0r:
[fade_in]"You've arrived... don't be surprised that I seem to know you.
Take these. Trust me, you'll need them."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TIME_EATER.talk.ANY.1-0r: [fade_in]"Another thousand years... another batch of new faces..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TIME_EATER.talk.IRONCLAD: [fade_in]"Why do you help me? We were enemies once."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"Though we were enemies, it wasn't a [jitter]decision made under my clear consciousness[/jitter]."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"In fact, I was also sent to monitor the [purple]anomalous changes[/purple] in this tower. But then something unexpected happened..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TIME_EATER.talk.SILENT.0: [fade_in]"...You're the least talkative long-lived species I've ever met..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TIME_EATER.talk.SILENT.1: [fade_in]"Take these—I don't need to say more, and you don't need to ask..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TIME_EATER.talk.SILENT.2: [fade_in]"Being enemies in the past doesn't mean being enemies forever. Though I don't like my colleague, she was ultimately right..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TIME_EATER.talk.DEFECT.2: [fade_in]"There's one thing I've never understood: why does that [blue]whale[/blue] revive you over and over again?"[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"Looks like you don't know either. Anyway, take these and go see the [gold]Architect[/gold] for repairs. Maybe he can fix you."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TIME_EATER.talk.NECROBIN: [fade_in]"An undead new face. So that [blue]whale[/blue] has gathered more people..."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"Regardless, accept this gift. You'll need it..."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"No special reason. You remind me of my past self."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TIME_EATER.talk.REGENT.0: [fade_in]"A stranger. You're not from around here, are you?"[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TIME_EATER.talk.REGENT.1: [fade_in]"That's right. Your king is a king among the stars! Firstborn of the Sun, Heir to the Stars..."[/fade_in]
STSBOSSANCIENTS-TIME_EATER.talk.REGENT.2: [fade_in]"Quiet down. Pick something and take it with you."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"Being too loud isn't always a good thing."[/fade_in]
[fade_in]"I am neither noisy nor a fool!"[/fade_in]
